Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}You all know the reason we're gathered here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}We need to discuss how to deal with Amada.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I knew it was strange when Aragaki-senpai told me he'd be late, but I didn't say anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}If I'd only listened to my intuition, this wouldn't have happened...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}If there's anyone who should have realized, it's me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I shoulda been takin' things more seriously, too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I knew this wasn't a game... But I never thought it'd end up like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}There's no point dwelling on the past.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Shinji's last words were, "This is how it should be."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}He was a hell of a guy... He even faced death with a smile.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}...So, from this day forward, I'll face things head-on, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Reporting in! Amada-san is not in his room![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Evidence indicates that his window has been pried open.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Wait, Fuuka, where are you going!? Do you even know where to look?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Well... no, but... we can't just let him go off on his own, right!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}You're just gonna run around without a clue? You'll never find him like that![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Maybe not, but we have to try![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Amada-kun has nowhere else to go... I know exactly how that feels...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}You of all people should understand, Yukari-chan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}Dragging him back won't change how he feels... And we can't protect him forever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}It's his choice. He's the only one who can decide how to live his life.[n]{f 1 1}
